name: soapysdr0.8-module-redpitaya
title: soapysdr0.8-module-redpitaya
description:
RedPitaya device support for SoapySDR
The Soapy Red Pitaya project provides a SoapySDR hardware support module.
Using this, any program using SoapySDR to interface to software
defined radio hardware can make use of the Red Pitaya HF channels to
transmit and receive.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use soapysdr0.8-module-redpitaya because RedPitaya device support for SoapySDR.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use soapysdr0.8-module-redpitaya as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair soapysdr0.8-module-redpitaya with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `soapysdr0.8-module-redpitaya --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
